headline: Roper Technologies (ROP) Valuation Check As Shares Rebound After Recent Weak Performance
summary: Roper Technologies stock: recent performance snapshot Roper Technologies (ROP) has been drawing attention after a period of mixed share performance, with a roughly 12% gain over the past month contrasting with weaker returns over the past 3 months and year. See our latest analysis for Roper Technologies. That 12% 1 month share price return sits against a 21% 3 month share price decline and a 38% 1 year total shareholder return loss, suggesting recent momentum is rebuilding after a tougher...
